ui-button.name: Button

stories.name: With Icon
stories.snippet: const WithIcon = () => <Button variant="primary" leftIcon={<Mail className="h-4 w-4" />}>Email with Icon</Button>;

stories.name: Icon Only
stories.snippet: const IconOnly = () => <Button variant="outline" size="icon"><Heart className="h-4 w-4 text-rose-500" /></Button>;

ui-button.import:
import { Button } from "@altrugenix/ui";
import { Heart, Mail } from "lucide-react";

ui-input.name: Input

stories.name: With Helper
stories.snippet:
const WithHelper = () => <Input
    label="Email"
    placeholder="you@example.com"
    helperText="We will never share your email." />;

stories.name: With Error
stories.snippet:
const WithError = () => <Input
    label="Password"
    type="password"
    defaultValue="short"
    errorText="Password must be at least 8 characters." />;

stories.name: With Icons
stories.snippet:
const WithIcons = () => <Input
    label="Search"
    placeholder="Search components..."
    leftAddon={<Search className="h-4 w-4" />} />;

stories.name: Disabled
stories.snippet: const Disabled = () => <Input label="API Key" disabled value="sk-••••••••••••••••" />;

ui-input.import:
import { Input } from "@altrugenix/ui";
import { Search } from "lucide-react";
